name: cronometrix-do-functions
description: Cronometrix DigitalOcean Functions — license server. This top-level package.json is for LOCAL TEST RUNTIME ONLY: it provides jsonwebtoken so unit tests can verify signed JWTs offline. The DO Functions runtime pre-installs jsonwebtoken v9, so the per-function package.json files declare only `pg` (the one dep DO does not pre-install).
